title: Ribogreen Assay
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol performs a Ribrogreen assay - for detailed protocol steps, please see below. There is the option to perform duplicate/triplicate plating. The csv for sample input should include `source slot, source well, destination well` in the header.
steps_raw: This protocol performs a Ribrogreen assay - for detailed protocol steps, please see below. There is the option to perform duplicate/triplicate plating. The csv for sample input should include `source slot, source well, destination well` in the header.
Calibration standard preparation in deep well plate (matrix buffer addition)
Calibration standard preparation in deep well plate (4 ug/mL calibration stock addition)
materials_raw: Opentrons 15 Tube Rack with eppendorf 5 mL
Opentrons 24 Tube Rack with NEST 2 mL Snapcap
Opentrons P300 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
